name: Catherine Bonifas Civic Center
description: Come play pickleball at Catherine Bonifas Civic Center in Escanaba, MI! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Gladstone 10th St Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Gladstone 10th St Courts in Gladstone, MI! There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Gladstone Area Pickleball
description: Gladstone Area Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Gladstone, MI. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Wells Township
description: Come play pickleball at Wells Township in Wells, MI! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Please feel free to schedule a session.
